RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFFS MOTION (TRANSACTION ID # 100020840) FILED BY DEFENDANT STRINGER, JOHN E.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSION OF TRUTH OF FACTS BE ADMITTED IS GRANTED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT, JOHN STRINGER MAY FILE MOTION TO RECONSIDER. COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT JOHN STRINGER, TO DATE, HAS NOT SERVED VERIFIED CODE-COMPLIANT NON-EVASIVE RESPONSES TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR NO: 8098, EMAIL: CASEY.GISELLE@GMAIL.COM. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Vivian L. Lerche of the law offices of Vivian L. Lerche (415-680-5731) makes a special appearance as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Craig Murdock of the law offices of Craig Murdock (415-235-5114) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted is granted without prejudice. Defendant, John Stringer may file motion to reconsider. Court finds that defendant John Stringer, to date, has not served verified code-compliant non-evasive responses to the requests for admission. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR No: 8098, email: casey.giselle@gmail.com. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Aug-28-2017 Continued To Sep-12-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vivian L. Lerche, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415.680.5731, specially appearaing for plaintiffs;
Craig Murdock, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415.235.5114, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. Defendant's counsel does not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem. PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted is continued to September 12, 2017, at 9:30 a.m., in Department 302, Law & Motion. Judge Pro Tem to prepare report and recommendation. Judge Pro Tem: Anne Hipshman; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
